svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3"> <diagram id="vpDeLYVY59p2734e9Fdb" name="第 1 页"> <mxGraphModel dx="1152" dy="859" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-1" value="源端口" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="120" width="160" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-2" value="目标端口" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="320" y="120" width="160" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-3" value="序列号" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="140" width="320" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-4" value="ACK序列号" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="160" width="320" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-5" value="<font>头部长度</font>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="180" width="50" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-6" value="未使用" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="210" y="180" width="50" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-7" value="U" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="180" width="10" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-8" value="A" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="180" width="10" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-9" value="P" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="280" y="180" width="10" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-10" value="R" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="180" width="10" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-11" value="S" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="300" y="180" width="10" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-12" value="F" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="310" y="180" width="10" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-13" value="接收窗口大小" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="320" y="180" width="160" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-14" value="校验和" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="200" width="160" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-15" value="紧急指针" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="320" y="200" width="160" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-16" value="其他配置（可变长度）" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="220" width="320" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-17" value="应用层数据（可变长度）" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="240" width="320" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PeH6U0Tca5Ew-AoFFfjL-18" value="32 bit" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="160" y="110" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="110" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
